vllm.title: [CI] clean docker cache for neuron
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/5947#018f2531-7974-43d9-b1e3-490eed35d08d
We are seeing builds running out disk space. This should help keep the disk pressure low, but keep caches around.
